title: West Bengal Election 2026 LIVE: 41.11% turnout by 11 am; Humayun Kabir visit to Murshidabad sparks TMC-police clash
description: West Bengal Assembly Voting 2026 LIVE Updates: A voter turnout of 18.76% was recorded in Bengal Phase 1 polls as violence marked polling. Crude bombs were hurled in Murshidabad’s Nowda, injuring several. A report also stated that at some places, EVM glitches disrupted voting.
